name: gradebook_application
description: Gradebook example exercising stacked headers, row labels, dynamic columns, and the column chooser.

scripts.build: npx quack build && npx quack copy

ExampleApplication.Title: Gradebook
ExampleApplication.Summary: An advanced tabular recordset with stacked headers, row labels, dynamic columns, row/column selection, column sorting, and a persistent column chooser — built purely from manifest configuration.
